text: This 4th Edition of International Organization provides a thorough update of a successful text that offers students of International Relations a thorough examination of international institutions. Written for the student who is beginning to grapple with the complexities of international relations, International Organization provides a conceptual framework for examining the role of international organizations in international politics and their effect on public policy.
headline: Fully Human Written
prediction: We believe that this document is fully human-written
